channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Ninajirachi and Porter Robinson Debut New Song at Coachella
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we dive into the latest music news. I'm your host, and today we're talking about a surprise debut at Coachella. Porter Robinson joined Ninajirachi on stage during her set on Friday night to premiere a brand new, unreleased track. The collaboration was hinted at earlier, with a teaser on Robinson's website that seemed to point to this very moment.
[Short music transition]
Host: "This isn't the first time these two electronic artists have worked together. Ninajirachi has previously supported Robinson on his SMILE! tour, including shows in Australia. And speaking of Australia, Ninajirachi has been making waves in the electronic and alternative pop scene, thanks in part to her debut album 'I Love My Computer'. The album swept the 2025 ARIA Awards, taking home three major categories: best breakthrough artist, best solo artist, and best independent release.
[Short music transition]
Host: "The Coachella debut is just the latest in a breakout stretch for Ninajirachi, who's next scheduled to return home for an Australian tour in July. As for the new collaboration with Porter Robinson, we don't have an official release date just yet, but fans are already buzzing about the upcoming track. We'll keep an eye on this and bring you more updates as they come. That's all for today, thanks for tuning in!"
[Outro music plays]
